allow: PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/recommendations/test" -Method GET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode, Content)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/recommendations/test" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Backend UP: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { Write-Host "Backend UP \(got $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Backend DOWN - not reachable" } })

Bash(grep -n "Post-sprint Community Page\\|## Production deployment\\|notifications_type\\|review_likes\\|GET | \\`/api/books/:googleId\\`\\|Day 12 migration\\|post_likes / comment_likes\\|comment_likes" CLAUDE.md)

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\Issa\\Desktop\\final; docker run --rm --add-host backend:127.0.0.1 -v "${PWD}\\nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro" nginx:alpine sh -c "apk add --no-cache openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; mkdir -p /etc/nginx/certs; openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout /etc/nginx/certs/selfsigned.key -out /etc/nginx/certs/selfsigned.crt -days 1 -subj '/CN=localhost' >/dev/null 2>&1; nginx -t" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== DNS test ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName auth.docker.io -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -First 2 } catch { Write-Output "DNS FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output "=== locally cached images ==="; docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "node|nginx|dockerfile|final")

PowerShell(foreach \($h in @\("google.com","registry-1.docker.io","qgoermeodyyfrfoyvnvo.supabase.co"\)\) { try { $r = Resolve-DnsName $h -ErrorAction Stop -QuickTimeout | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "$h -> OK \($\($r.IPAddress\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "$h -> FAIL" } })

PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}\\backend:/app" -w /app node:20.19.2-bookworm-slim bash -c "cp -r /app /tmp/b && cd /tmp/b && rm -rf node_modules && \(npm ci --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund; echo EXIT_CODE=\\$?\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Output "=== dmesg OOM check ==="; wsl.exe -d docker-desktop dmesg 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern "Out of memory|Killed process|oom" | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(docker run --rm --memory=6g -v "${PWD}\\backend:/src:ro" node:20.19.2-bookworm-slim bash -c 'cp -r /src /app && cd /app && rm -rf node_modules && echo "NPM=$\(npm -v\)"; npm ci --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund; echo "CI_EXIT=$?"; echo "PEAK_MB=$\(\( $\(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory.peak 2>/dev/null || echo 0\) / 1048576 \)\)"' 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)

PowerShell(docker run --rm --memory=6g -v "${PWD}:/work:ro" node:20.19.2-bookworm-slim bash /work/scripts/_npmtest.sh 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "NODE=|CI_EXIT=|PEAK_MB=|Exit handler|added \\d+ packages|npm error code" | Select-Object -Last 10)
PowerShell(curl.exe -sk https://localhost:8443/api/health; Write-Output ""; curl.exe -sk -o NUL -w "books-search HTTP %{http_code}\\n" "https://localhost:8443/api/books/search?q=dune&maxResults=2")

PowerShell($doc = curl.exe -s http://localhost:3000/api/docs-json | ConvertFrom-Json; "OpenAPI: $\($doc.openapi\)  Title: $\($doc.info.title\)"; "Paths:"; $doc.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name | Sort-Object; "Security schemes: " + \($doc.components.securitySchemes.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\); "--- auth check \(no key, should be 401\) ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/api/public/v1/shelf)

PowerShell("--- public endpoint headers \(rate limit\) ---"; curl.exe -s -D - -o NUL http://localhost:3000/api/public/v1/shelf -H "X-API-Key: rt_live_bogus" | Select-String -Pattern "RateLimit|HTTP/"; "--- swagger UI html ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "docs page: %{http_code}`n" http://localhost:3000/api/docs; "--- PUT documented? ---"; \(curl.exe -s http://localhost:3000/api/docs-json | ConvertFrom-Json\).paths.'/api/public/v1/shelf/{id}'.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ", ")

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\Issa\\Desktop\\final\\backend; $env:NODE_ENV="development"; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main" -RedirectStandardOutput boot.log -RedirectStandardError boot.err.log -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; "=== startup tail ==="; Get-Content boot.log -Tail 4; if \(Test-Path boot.err.log\) { $e = Get-Content boot.err.log -Raw; if \($e\) { "=== STDERR ==="; $e } })

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\Issa\\Desktop\\final\\backend; $env:NODE_ENV="development"; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main" -RedirectStandardOutput boot.log -RedirectStandardError boot.err.log -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; node diag-signup.mjs 2>&1)
